query: Hands-on task to build RAG agent using Copilot Studio
labs:
### Lab Title
Connecting Fabric Data Agents with Microsoft Copilot Studio

### Why Relevant
This lab is essential for makers and developers looking to enhance their AI agents' capabilities by enabling intelligent agent-to-agent communication. It addresses common challenges faced in data integration and querying, allowing for seamless collaboration between specialized agents to provide accurate analytics without manual intervention.

### Learnings
- Create and configure Fabric Data Agents with meta-prompts.
- Establish a connection between Fabric Data Agents and Microsoft Copilot Studio.
- Enable intelligent data querying through connected agents.
- Gain hands-on experience with agent orchestration.
- Understand how to leverage AI-powered data agents for business intelligence.
- Transform isolated systems into a collaborative AI ecosystem.

For more details, visit: [Connecting Fabric Data Agents with Microsoft Copilot Studio](https://pratapladhani.github.io/mcs-labs/labs/data-fabric-agent/)

query: Practice exercise for hybrid RAG + knowledge graph agent
labs:
### Lab Title Create an 'Ask me anything' agent for your employees
### Why this lab is relevant This lab addresses the common challenges faced by employees in accessing information across multiple systems. By creating an intelligent agent, organizations can streamline the process of obtaining answers to frequently asked questions, thereby saving time and improving employee satisfaction.
### What user will learn
- How to create an intelligent "Ask me anything" agent that connects to various knowledge sources, including SharePoint and ServiceNow.
- Techniques for configuring knowledge prioritization.
- Steps to deploy agents to Microsoft 365 Copilot.
- Implementation of AI-powered document analysis with human review workflows.
- Methods for adding custom knowledge to the agent.
- Strategies for creating child agents for specific use cases, such as IT support.
- How to configure suggested prompts for enhanced user interaction.
For more information, visit: [Create an 'Ask me anything' agent for your employees](https://pratapladhani.github.io/mcs-labs/labs/ask-me-anything/)

labs:
# Title: Building an Enterprise AI Assistant

## Goal
Transform a basic AI agent into a sophisticated, data-driven assistant that learns and improves over time, enhancing user experiences and driving better business outcomes.

👉 **Task**
- Analyze user interactions to identify areas for improvement.
- Implement machine learning algorithms to enable continuous learning.
- Design a feedback loop to gather user insights and refine responses.
- Measure the effectiveness of the AI assistant using key performance indicators (KPIs).

✅ **Learning (skills gained)**
- Proficiency in machine learning techniques for AI development.
- Ability to analyze and interpret user data for system enhancement.
- Skills in designing user feedback mechanisms.
- Understanding of performance measurement and optimization strategies.

For more details, visit: [Measure Success Lab](https://pratapladhani.github.io/mcs-labs/labs/measure-success/)

query: what tools would you use to make this
labs:
📚 Title: Introduction to Data Visualization with Python

🎯 Goal:
Learn how to create basic data visualizations using Python libraries to effectively communicate data insights.

👉 Tasks:
• Install Python and set up a virtual environment.
• Import necessary libraries: Matplotlib and Seaborn.
• Load a sample dataset (e.g., Iris dataset) using Pandas.
• Create basic visualizations: a scatter plot and a bar chart.
• Customize the visualizations with titles, labels, and color schemes.

✅ Learning:
Skills gained include data manipulation with Pandas, creating visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn, and understanding how to present data insights effectively.

Topic:
Tools: Python, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Pandas, Jupyter Notebook.
